scope: Corrected GPU-side interpretation of the EP4/EP8 TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4 Flash S4096 profile split.

important_correction.cpu_range_warning: The CPU user-annotation ranges in the full-run traces can make mori_aiter.local_padded_vjp.swiglu_forward/backward appear to dominate. That is a queueing/synchronization artifact for kernel-family attribution.
important_correction.gpu_annotation_read: Use top_gpu_user_annotations/top_kernels for the actual GPU split. On GPU, the pure Triton SwiGLU forward/backward kernels are small; padded GEMM/BMM-family work and MORI combine are the real MoE backward walls.
important_correction.do_not_conclude: Do not spend the next optimization pass only on the Triton SwiGLU elementwise kernels.

attention_reference_points.note: Attention remains meaningful, but in this profile the MoE routed backward path is the larger and more actionable wall.

owner_rank_cuda_event_probe_cross_check.read: The standalone owner-rank probe still shows the ideal compact local VJP is around 6-7 ms, with true SwiGLU kernels around 0.1 ms each. The larger full-run GPU annotation per-call values should be treated as integrated-training profiler evidence with overlap, load imbalance, and profiler overhead, not as a replacement for the microbench floor.

optimization_ladder.evidence: EP8 combine_dx.call is 2165.5 ms/rank over 64 calls, and EpCombineIntraNodeKernel_bf16_nop2p is the top kernel family in the trace.
optimization_ladder.next_action: Avoid another receive-count/source-position sync pass; pursue registered-buffer combine, overlap, or a training combine backward that avoids the current expensive dx combine path.

optimization_ladder.item: Local owner-rank MoE VJP GEMM family
optimization_ladder.evidence: EP8 padded local VJP GEMM-family annotations sum to about 2059.8 ms/rank over 64 calls; EP4 sums to about 3409.9 ms/rank because each rank owns 64 experts.
optimization_ladder.next_action: Replace the six padded bmm groups with a training-aware fused MoE backward or a production grouped training GEMM path for w13 forward, w2 dgrad, w2/w13 wgrad, and xgrad.

optimization_ladder.evidence: The owner-rank probe saves about 1.58 ms at EP8 and 1.88 ms at EP4 when gate/up/hidden plus compact unweighted output are available. Public AITER stage1-hidden-only saves almost nothing.
optimization_ladder.next_action: Need AITER/MORI forward contract that exposes gate/up/hidden/out_compact, or a fused backward that recomputes them internally without separate padded materialization.

optimization_ladder.evidence: EP8 route/pack/scatter misc is about 242.7 ms/rank over 64 calls, smaller than GEMM and combine but still visible.
optimization_ladder.next_action: Keep after the GEMM/combine branch; avoid making it the primary lever.

optimization_ladder.evidence: EP8 pure Triton SwiGLU forward+backward is about 104.1 ms/rank over 64 calls, far below the padded GEMM and combine walls.
optimization_ladder.next_action: Do not prioritize standalone SwiGLU kernel tuning now.

bottom_line: The EP4/EP8 profile pass confirms the next MoE backward work is not dispatch/combine-only and not pure SwiGLU. It is MORI dx combine plus compact/fused training GEMM/VJP for the routed experts, with an AITER-style intermediate contract change needed to harvest the saved-activation floor.
